title: Vanilla Reinvented
description: A Vanilla+ modpack that expand onto the vanilla experience with new features and custom recipes.
body:
![about text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fae53c6a58d3e7b9e3a8ca36bb76b5ea5e4388a.png)

Vanilla Reinvented is a vanilla expansion modpack expending on worldgen, food, automation, progression, as well as revamping the end dimension and adding new dungeons and structures to stumble upon during your adventures.

![content text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/809305871c29fc13f45e42c975b72705fde82f1e.png)

The modpack has custom kubejs recipes to expand progression and automation, with new alloys such as steel and bronze, new sets of tools and armors and the expansion of early game with copper tools…

Many recipes have been added to automate recources, You can now fully automate the production of iron, copper, zinc, gold, lead, palladium, shadoline, andesite alloy, brass, enderpearls as well as many stone types and more !

The modpack also features a end update with new biomes, mobs, wood types, structures, items, ores, mechanics and enchantements.

And the biggest change of the entire pack is the exploration, with a totally revamped worldgen with severall new biomes and wood types. The overworld as well as the nether also have brand new structures to loot and explore as well as underground dungeons in caves with new traps and spawners.

A bunch of other features are also disponible such as a camera to take picture, the create mod as well as some addons to automate and make your builds feel alive and a total rework of cooking with Farmers delight that is totally compatible with the multiple new food items Added by other mods. (the modpack also features a custom resource pack for the title screen and some texture changes from https://vanillatweaks.net/).

![other render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a8c5dba2a3d3bac1744150eceeb52e691386812.png)

If you have any feedback (suggestions, bug report, or recipe changes ideas) then let me now by sending me a dm over on discord (@gravitix_666)
